title: EasyShulkerBoxes Supplementaries Sacks Compat
description: Adds compatibility for EasyShulkerBoxes with Supplementaries
body:
This datapack simply adds compatibility between EasyShulkerBoxes and the Sacks from Supplementaries, allowing you to select, insert and extract items through the tooltip like you would with a Shulker Box.

It also now works with Supplementaries Squared coloured sacks.
